name: String Hashing (Polynomial Rolling Hash)
description: Compute polynomial rolling hash for each prefix: H(s[0..i]) = s[0]*p^i + ... + s[i]*p^0 mod m.
intuition: Assign each prefix a hash value. Extending by one character multiplies by base and adds the new char value — O(1) per extension. Two equal substrings share the same hash with high probability.
